title: pip publish simemu package and install.sh improvements
description:
Finish simemu's packaging story so the public install path is stable and reproducible across wrapper, monitor, and menu bar surfaces.

Acceptance criteria:
- simemu can be installed cleanly through a supported package flow
- install.sh repairs broken wrappers and confirms the active binary path
- the menu bar app and monitor setup are validated after install
- release and install docs match the shipped commands exactly
acceptanceCriteria: a supported package distribution path works end to end
install.sh repairs stale wrappers and validates the active binary
monitor and menu bar setup are validated after install
release and install docs match the shipped commands
